𝗚𝗢𝗚𝗖𝗟𝗜 | Managing and automating Google Workspace services directly from the command line.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Managing and automating Google Workspace services directly from the command line.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Feb 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Gmail management (search, send, labels, etc.)
✅ Calendar event management (create, update, conflicts, etc.)
✅ Drive file management (list, search, upload, download, permissions)
✅ Contacts management (search, create, update)
✅ Tasks management (tasklists, tasks)
✅ Sheets read/write operations
✅ Forms creation and response inspection
✅ Docs/Slides export
✅ Multiple account support
✅ Secure credential storage
✅ Least-privilege authentication
✅ JSON output for scripting


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 364 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 78 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

gogcli is a fast, script-friendly command-line interface for managing various Google Workspace services, including Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and more. It offers JSON-first output, support for multiple accounts, and secure credential management, making it ideal for automation and terminal-based workflows.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/steipete/gogcli

𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗔𝗦𝗘 | Simplifying and automating database backups and restorations for various database engines in a self-hosted environment.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Simplifying and automating database backups and restorations for various database engines in a self-hosted environment.
📅 Created: Oct 2024 • Updated: Feb 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Database backup and restore tool
✅ Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, MongoDB
✅ Web UI for management
✅ Integrates with Portabase agents for secure operations
✅ Self-hosted and open-source
✅ Dockerized for easy deployment


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 405 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 21 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Portabase is a self-hosted, open-source tool designed to simplify database backup and restoration for PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, and MongoDB. It leverages a web UI and integrates with agents for secure and efficient operations, making database management accessible for developers and DevOps professionals.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗚𝗘𝗢𝗔𝗜 | Applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to geospatial data for analysis and visualization, accessible through Python and a QGIS plugin.  🌟 Rising Fast!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Applying state-of-the-art deep learning models to geospatial data for analysis and visualization, accessible through Python and a QGIS plugin.
📅 Created: Aug 2023 • Updated: Feb 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Interactive and programmatic search and download of remote sensing imagery and geospatial data
✅ Automated dataset preparation with image chips and label generation
✅ Model training for classification, detection, and segmentation
✅ Inference pipelines for applying models to new geospatial datasets
✅ Interactive visualization through integration with Leafmap and MapLibre
✅ Seamless QGIS integration via a dedicated GeoAI plugin
✅ Support for multiple data formats (GeoTIFF, JPEG2000, GeoJSON, Shapefile, GeoPackage)
✅ Automatic device management for GPU acceleration


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 362 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 12 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GeoAI is a Python package that integrates artificial intelligence with geospatial data analysis. It provides tools for processing satellite imagery and vector data, training AI models for tasks like segmentation and classification, and visualizing results, with seamless integration into QGIS.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/opengeos/geoai

𝗘𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗜𝗥𝗘 | To provide a private, self-hosted AI assistant that can intelligently organize, search, and automate tasks across a user's diverse personal data without relying on cloud services.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a private, self-hosted AI assistant that can intelligently organize, search, and automate tasks across a user's diverse personal data without relying on cloud services.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: Feb 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local-first and self-hosted AI assistant
✅ Unifies diverse data types (tasks, notes, docs, photos, bookmarks)
✅ Privacy-focused with local models and data storage
✅ AI-powered content understanding, search, classification, OCR, and automation
✅ Extensible via APIs
✅ Simplified self-hosting with unified deployment options
✅ Support for various AI models and database backends (Postgres, SQLite)
✅ Modern frontend framework (Vite + TanStack Router)

Eclaire is a self-hosted, local-first AI assistant designed to unify and process personal data, including tasks, notes, documents, photos, and bookmarks. It prioritizes privacy and extensibility, allowing users to run it entirely on their own hardware with local models and data storage.

DockMon is a comprehensive platform for monitoring and managing Docker containers. It offers real-time insights, automated recovery, and multi-channel alerts for containerized applications.

✅ Create a sprite/grid sheet of all generated faces

✅ Option to use Python script for advanced control over generation

Face Looker is a project that generates AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and provides an interactive React component to display them. It allows users to create engaging UI elements where a face image dynamically follows the cursor's position.
